pages.title: Problem: "Mod won't load / Crashes on startup"
pages.text: $(bold)Possible causes$(): $(li)Missing Compact Machines dependency $(li)Wrong Minecraft/NeoForge version $(li)Java version mismatch$(br2)$(bold)Solutions$(): $(li)Check Minecraft version is 1.21.1 $(li)Install Compact Machines mod (required dependency) $(li)Verify NeoForge 21.1.221+ is installed $(li)Ensure Java 21 is installed (`java -version`) $(li)Check crash log for specific error

pages.title: Problem: "Compact Machines not found"
pages.text: $(bold)Cause$(): Compact Machines mod not installed$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Download Compact Machines for 1.21.1 $(li)Place in `mods/` folder $(li)Restart Minecraft$(br2)---
